creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Dec 28, 2006 at 11:37:11AM +0100, Thierry Thomas wrote:
 > Hello,
 > 
 > Marcin Wisnicki has submitted the PR ports/106573
 > <http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=106573>
 > which normalizes version numbers used by Aspell dictionaries.
 > 
 > This implies to bump PORTEPOCH in your ports textproc/fa-aspell and
 > vietnamese/aspell.
 > 
 > Currently                Patch applied
 > ---------                -------------
 > fa-aspell-6.f.0.10.0     fa-aspell-0.10.0,1
 > vi-aspell-6.v.0.01.1.1   vi-aspell-0.01.1.1,1
 > 
 > Do you approve the proposed patch?
 
 OK.
  
 -- 
 -- David  (obrien@FreeBSD.org)
